summary: Violations issued to illegally operating (unlicensed) waste haulers followed the same arc as BIC's overall violation count: a fiscal 2023 spike tied to clearing a pandemic-era violations backlog after the agency's traffic-safety authority expanded, a fiscal 2024 drop once a new Violation Unit worked through that backlog, and a fiscal 2025 rebound that BIC links to heightened on-street enforcement and a 45% jump in complaints received that year.

sources.label: Business Integrity Commission, Fiscal 2024 Mayor's Management Report
Business Integrity Commission, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: decreasing overall, following the same backlog-clearance pattern as other BIC violations
